Bus Timings

Bus 33 Timetable Commercial International Bank to ADNEC

July 30, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus 33 in Abu Dhabi is a key public transport service connecting major commercial and residential areas across the city. This route is essential for daily commuters and visitors, providing a convenient and affordable way to navigate Abu Dhabi.

Route Name 33
Route Description Abu Dhabi — Commercial International Bank - ADNEC
Total Distance Approximately 15 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 57 minutes
Operational Hours 05:27 to 00:00 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website AD Mobility

Download PDF Bus 33

Bus 33 Route in Abu Dhabi

Bus Timings

Bus 33 operates with a consistent schedule throughout the day, ensuring frequent service. Here are the departure times:

Bus 33 Timetable

For the full schedule, you can visit the official AD Mobility website, or follow this link for 33 Bus Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for Bus 33 follows the standard public transport pricing in Abu Dhabi. A single journey typically costs AED 3, depending on the distance traveled. For the most accurate fare information, it’s recommended to check the fare details on the bus or consult with the bus driver.

Bus Booking

Currently, Bus 33 does not offer online booking options. Passengers can board the bus directly at any of the designated stops along the route without prior reservation. For real-time tracking, schedule updates, and other essential travel information, the Darb app is highly recommended. This app provides valuable insights into the bus’s whereabouts, ensuring that passengers can plan their journeys effectively and avoid any delays.

Bus Route

Bus 33 begins its journey at the Commercial International Bank and makes several key stops along the way.

  1. Abu Dhabi — Commercial International Bank

  2. Abu Dhabi — Public Beach Main Entrance

  3. Mubarak Bin Mohammed Street

  4. Al Ayda Street

  5. Al Hist Street

  6. Emirates Diplomatic Academy

  7. Central Souq

  8. Liwa Center

  9. Zayed The First Street

  10. Madinat Zayed Shopping Centre

  11. Gold Center

  12. Central Post Office

  13. Al Falah Street

  14. Mariam Bint Said Mosque

  15. Hazaa Bin Zayed Street

  16. Abu Dhabi Bus Station

  17. Mohamed Bin Khalifa Street

  18. EIBFS

  19. ECSSR

  20. Abu Dhabi Mens College

  1. Shakhbout Bin Sultan Street

  3. Al Sad Street

  6. Sheikh Hamdan Bin Tahnoon Mosque

  7. Al Dhafra Street

  8. Police College

  9. Local Affairs Depatment

  10. Rabdan Street

  11. Al Zafaranah Health Centre

  12. Dhafeer Street

  13. Al Reehan Public Garden

  14. ADNEC

  15. ADNEC

Bus 33 Station Overview

Abu Dhabi — Commercial International Bank

The Abu Dhabi — Commercial International Bank bus station is located in a bustling commercial area of Abu Dhabi. The station is well-connected to various parts of the city, making it a convenient stop for those traveling to and from the central business district. Its location near important financial institutions highlights its significance as a transit hub for daily commuters.

ADNEC

ADNEC bus station is strategically located near the Abu Dhabi National Exhibition Centre, one of the largest exhibition venues in the Middle East. This station caters primarily to visitors attending events, conferences, and exhibitions at ADNEC.

With its proximity to major hotels and business facilities, the station ensures convenient and efficient transportation for both local residents and international visitors. The station is equipped with modern amenities and offers easy access to various parts of the city, making it a crucial stop for event-goers and business travelers.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

There are several tourist attractions and destinations along the Bus 33 route in Abu Dhabi:

  1. Abu Dhabi Public Beach: A popular spot for both tourists and residents, offering a beautiful shoreline, clear waters, and a range of beach facilities.

  2. Emirates Diplomatic Academy: While primarily an educational institution, the area around it is close to various cultural and historical landmarks in Abu Dhabi.

  3. Central Souq: A traditional market where visitors can explore a variety of shops selling spices, textiles, souvenirs, and more, providing an authentic shopping experience.

  4. Madinat Zayed Shopping Centre: A major shopping destination in the city, offering a mix of retail stores, dining options, and entertainment.

5.

  1. ADNEC (Abu Dhabi National Exhibition Centre): A key event venue in the city, hosting various international exhibitions, conferences, and events throughout the year.

These destinations make Bus 33 not only a convenient transport option but also a route that passes by some of Abu Dhabi’s key attractions.

Journey Experience

A trip on Bus 33 from Commercial International Bank to ADNEC offers a long but scenic journey through the heart of Abu Dhabi. As you pass through key areas of the city, you get to experience a blend of urban and cultural landmarks.

One highlight of the journey is the Abu Dhabi National Exhibition Centre (ADNEC), a major venue for international events and conferences.

Travelling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can easily travel to ADNEC, the furthest point on the Bus 33 route, starting from the Commercial International Bank in Abu Dhabi. The ride offers a convenient alternative to the bus, with a price range of AED 43-52, making it an accessible option for those looking for a quicker or more personalized journey. Additionally, Careem provides real-time tracking and various payment options, ensuring a smooth and hassle-free experience.

Whether commuting to work or exploring the city, this bus route offers a reliable and convenient travel experience. Its coverage of key areas makes it a valuable option for accessing both commercial hubs and popular attractions.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: July 30, 2025.
